transcription.text: Where is your next pimple most likely to be? All over your face. Because that's where acne bacteria are, all over your face. Which is why you need new OxySensitive to kill acne bacteria with virtually no drying, no irritation. Guaranteed. So you can use it every day to help eliminate pimples, prevent unborn pimples all over your face. Curb your pimples need to breed. OxyCutum in advance with new OxySensitive. Exert control over something.
